task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Harvest log in farmOS Field Kit
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the farmOS Field Kit interface with a new log creation form open, specifically indicating a 'Harvest' log type.

task_completion.description: Enter the expected title for the log
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Daily Egg Collection - Red Barn' is visible in the log name or title input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct quantity and unit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '22' is entered in the quantity field and 'dozen' is selected or entered in the unit field.

task_completion.description: Enter the required notes about the egg collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes or description text area contains the text 'Collected from nest boxes. 4 cracked eggs discarded. Refilled oyster shell hopper.'

task_completion.description: Save the log and verify it appears in the main list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main list or dashboard of farmOS Field Kit is shown, displaying the newly created 'Daily Egg Collection - Red Barn' log, indicating it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to create the log
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the farmOS Field Kit graphical user interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is farmOS Field Kit, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Daily Egg Collection - Red Barn'. Expected Log Type: 'Harvest'. Expected Quantity: '22'. Expected Unit: 'dozen'. Expected Notes must contain: 'oyster shell hopper' (specifically 'Collected from nest boxes. 4 cracked eggs discarded. Refilled oyster shell hopper.').
